title: aotus procumbens
intro: Aotus procumbens is a type of plant, also known as climbing fern, which is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Aotus procumbens include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of Aotus procumbens often involve infusing the leaves in hot water to make a tea, or using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
